key_themes: FY2025 earnings beat with revenue +10.4% and adjusted operating profit +7.1%
Active £25m share buyback program with ongoing cancellations
Insider purchases (CEO/PDMR) and capital returns focus
Strong Buy/Buy analyst consensus with ~20% upside to ~1,156p target
Attractive ~4% dividend yield with recent increase
summary: Grafton Group plc (GFTU.L), a European building materials distributor, reported solid FY2025 results in early March 2026, beating profit expectations, growing revenue 10.4%, increasing its dividend, and launching a £25m share buyback. The company has continued executing the buyback in April 2026 alongside earlier CEO insider buying, while scheduling a Capital Markets Day for June. Analysts see 20%+ upside from current levels near 960p with Buy ratings, though the construction sector outlook remains cautious in parts of the UK and Europe; retail investor discussion on X is minimal.[[1]](https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/GFTU.L/)[[2]](https://www.tipranks.com/news/company-announcements/grafton-advances-25m-buyback-with-further-share-cancellation)[[3]](https://www.graftonplc.com/~/media/Files/G/Grafton-Group/2025%20FULL%20YEAR%20RESULTS%20march%202026/Grafton-Group%20plc-Final-Results-2025-Presentation-FINAL.pdf)
sources: 10+ finance/news articles (Yahoo Finance, LSE RNS, TipRanks, MarketBeat, company reports), Low X activity (~5 relevant financial posts found in past 6-12 months; union-related posts dominate #GFTU searches)
